finding_results.notes: Standardized all Chapter 4 bounty references to the canonical four-thousand-gold-crown figure and tightened nearby phrasing so the amount reads as immediate pursuit pressure.
Reconciled narration, internal threat readout, and dialogue to the continuity-sheet bounty amount within the chapter scope.
Removed the repeated narrator explanation of Derry's fear-chatter and replaced it with concrete chatter plus strap-fidgeting so the tell is shown instead of diagnosed.
Normalized descriptive and expository punctuation across the chapter. Post-revision validation found 0 prose lines containing em-dashes, down from 62.
Every surviving bounty mention in Chapter 4 now uses the canonical four-thousand-gold-crown amount.
Restored Aldric's canonical title to Knight-paladin of the Order of the Veil's Fourth Seal.
Expanded the failed-consumption aftermath and the emergency bank-building with causally necessary material. Post-revision word count is 5062 while preserving the Chapter 5 handoff.

Replaced four clipped diagnostic prompts with two run-on turns where Derry processes aloud through self-correction, trailing qualifications, and aborted clauses. He still lands the essential facts (two voices, assassin classification, opposed types) but arrives through frightened overtalk rather than a clean question ladder. Maren's single terse response preserved. Pack-strap business integrated into the speech rhythm rather than separated into its own beat.

finding_results.notes: Replaced the post-collision inventory beat with Maren's embodied sense of the crowded skull, Derry's live reaction, and a Vess/Aldric exchange that turns the unsettled state into immediate bank-and-settlement pressure before Aldric fails at the reclassification description.

pass_summaries.summary: Fixed all packet findings in Chapter 4: bounty continuity is now consistent at four thousand gold crowns, Aldric's title is canonical, Derry's fear-talk is shown rather than re-explained, em-dash overuse was removed, and the hollow aftermath was expanded past 5000 words without changing the next chapter's starting state.

One finding addressed. Derry's debrief exchange collapsed from a four-prompt staircase into two messy processing turns with self-correction, run-on connectors, and a trailing question that undercuts itself. The passage now reads as stressed Derry rather than generic witness debriefing.

Revised the collision aftermath to stay in Maren's body and ear, show the new three-way configuration through live scene pressure, and preserve the unclassified reclassification beat without pausing for schematic summary.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=9, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
